description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with three quarter sleeves, has a round neckline with tape detailing on the upper chest panel and has a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron insideEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this round neck kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
